UnitAbilities.Title: Hammer of Wrath
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ancient Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains an Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit

UnitAbilities.Title: Command Squad
UnitAbilities.Text: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: Company Heroes
Infos.Text: You must attach one Captain or Chapter Master model to this unit. If this is not possible, this unit does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

Rule.Restrictions:
▪ Your army can include Adeptus Astartes Deathwatch units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.
▪ With the exception of Kill Team Cassius (see Legends: Agents of the Imperium), your army cannot include any Agents of the Imperium Deathwatch units.
▪ Your army cannot include any of the following units: ASSAULT SQUAD; Assault Squad with Jump Packs; Attack Bike Squad; Devastator Squad; Land Speeder Storm; Relic Terminator Squad; Scout Bike Squad; Scout Squad; Scout Sniper Squad; Tactical Squad; Terminator Assault Squad; Terminator Squad.
Rule.Title: MISSION TACTICS
Rule.Text:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Mission Tactics listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Mission Tactic is active and its effects apply to all units from your army with this ability. Each Mission Tactic can only be selected once per battle. 

FUROR TACTICS
When the enemy horde grows close, the Deathwatch will be tasked with the decimation of their core. Aiming not for clinical kills but for maximum destruction over a wide area, they tear the heart from the enemy army. While this Mission Tactic is active, weapons equipped by Adeptus Astartes units from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. 

MALLEUS TACTICS
When the giants of war lumber forth, the Deathwatch will adopt Malleus tactics. Even the largest behemoth has a weak point, and the archives of the Deathwatch number them all. While this Mission Tactic is active, weapons equipped by Adeptus Astartes units from your army have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. 

PURGATUS TACTICS
By adopting Purgatus tactics, the Deathwatch focus their deadly ire upon the commanders of the enemy host, assassinating them one after another with pitiless head shots and killing thrusts of the blade. While this Mission Tactic is active, each time an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army makes an attack, if a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Adaptive Tactics
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Kill Team units from your army, or one other Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: For each unit targeted, select Furor Tactics, Malleus Tactics or Purgatus Tactics. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Mission Tactic is active for that unit instead of any Mission Tactic that is active for your army.

Stratagems.Name: Hellfire Rounds
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kill Team unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons (excluding Devastating Wounds weapons) equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 2+] and [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] abilities.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Dragonfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: Kraken Rounds
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kill Team unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and improve the Range characteristic of those weapons by 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Dragonfire Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: Dragonfire Rounds
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Kill Team unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select any units that have already been targeted with either the Kraken Rounds or Hellfire Rounds Stratagems this phase.

Stratagems.Name: Site-to-site Teleportation
Stratagems.Category: BLACK SPEAR TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Kill Team units from your army, or one other Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army, if those units are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves. Until the end of your next Movement phase, models in those units that do not have the Deep Strike ability have the Deep Strike ability.

Enhancements.Name: Thief of Secrets
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more enemy models were destroyed as a result of a melee attack made by the bearer this phase, until the end of the battle, improve the Strength, Damage and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

Enhancements.Name: Osseus Key
Enhancements.Description: Watch Master or Techmarine model only. At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit (excluding Titanic units) within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Beacon Angelis
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability. In addition, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

Enhancements.Name: The Tome of Ectoclades
Enhancements.Description:
Watch Master or Captain model only. Once per battle, after you have selected your Oath of Moment target, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select a second enemy unit to be an Oath of Moment target. 

Designer’s Note: This means that each time a model with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets either of your Oath of Moment targets, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: COMBAT DOCTRINES
Rule.Text:
At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all Adeptus Astartes units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle.
	▪ DEVASTATOR DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. 
	▪ TACTICAL DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. 
	▪ ASSAULT DOCTRINE
This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Only In Death Does Duty End
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Honour The Chapter
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Adaptive Strategy
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that doctrine this battle.

Stratagems.Name: Storm of Fire
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Squad Tactics
Stratagems.Category: GLADIUS TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that is within 8" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Artificer Armour
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: The Honour Vehement
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

Enhancements.Name: Adept of the Codex
Enhancements.Description: Captain model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for your army, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for the bearer’s unit only, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine to be active for your army this battle.

Enhancements.Name: Fire Discipline
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

Rule.Title: SHIELD OF THE IMPERIUM
Rule.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by Adeptus Astartes models from your army have the [HEAVY] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model’s unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Rigid Discipline
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of upto 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: When making that move, your unit must end that move either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker.

Stratagems.Name: Not One Backwards Step
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army within range of an objective marker.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

Stratagems.Name: No Threat Too Great
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Battle Drill Recall
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If yourunit Remained Stationary this turn, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: Hail of Vengeance
Stratagems.Category: ANVIL SIEGE FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Enhancements.Name: Indomitable Fury
Enhancements.Description: Gravis model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Enhancements.Name: Fleet Commander
Enhancements.Description: Captain model only. Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12” of the centre of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the centre of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Both markers are then removed.

Enhancements.Name: Stoic Defender
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability while they are within range of an objective marker you control and, while that unit is Battle-shocked, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit instead of changing it to 0.

Enhancements.Name: Architect of War
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Rule.Title: ARMOURED WRATH
Rule.Text: Once per phase for each Adeptus Astartes unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

Stratagems.Name: UNBOWED CONVICTION
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: MERCY IS WEAKNESS
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase orthe Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a Vehicle, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

Stratagems.Name: VENGEFUL ANIMUS
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

Stratagems.Name: ANCIENT FURY
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Walker model from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model’s Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: POWER OF THE MACHINE SPIRIT
Stratagems.Category: IRONSTORM SPEARHEAD - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Vehicle unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Enhancements.Name: Target Augury Web
Enhancements.Description: Techmarine model only. In your Command phase, select one Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by that Vehicle model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Enhancements.Name: The Flesh is Weak
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

Enhancements.Name: Adept of the Omnissiah
Enhancements.Description: Techmarine model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 6'' of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Enhancements.Name: Master of Machine War
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. In your Command phase, select one Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Vehicle is eligible to shoot even if it Fell Back or Advanced this turn.

Rule.Title: CLOSE-RANGE ERADICATION
Rule.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by Adeptus Astartes models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Crucible of Battle
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase orthe Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Rapid Embarkation
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army wholly within 6" of that Transport.
Stratagems.Effect: Your Infantry unit can embark within that Transport.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot target an Infantry unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that cannot normally embark within that Transport, or that disembarked from a Transport this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Immolation Protocols
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Onslaught of Fire
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that disembarked from a Transport this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Burning Vengeance
Stratagems.Category: FIRESTORM ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: One unit embarked within that Transport can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

Enhancements.Name: Champion of Humanity
Enhancements.Description: Tacticus model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit can ignore any or all modifiers to their characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for them (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

Enhancements.Name: War-Tempered Artifice
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

Enhancements.Name: Forged in Battle
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

Enhancements.Name: Adamantine Mantle
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

Rule.Title: LIGHTNING ASSAULT
Rule.Text: Adeptus Astartes units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Blitzing Fusillade
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

Stratagems.Name: Full Throttle
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Mounted or Adeptus Astartes Vehicle unit (excluding Walkers] from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is Mounted.

Stratagems.Name: Shock Assault
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Ride Hard, Ride Fast
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Mounted or Adeptus Astartes Fly Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Wind-Swift Evasion
Stratagems.Category: STORMLANCE TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Fury of the Storm
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Mounted model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearers melee weapons by 2 instead.

Enhancements.Name: Portents of Wisdom
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Feinting Withdrawal
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Enhancements.Name: Hunter’s Instincts
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Mounted model only. Ifthe bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

Rule.Title: SHADOW MASTERS
Rule.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", the target has the benefit of cover.

Stratagems.Name: A Deadly Prize
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of the Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Surgical Strikes
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Strike from the Shadows
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

Stratagems.Name: Calculated Feint
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit within 12" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a Phobos or Scout Squad unit.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Guerrilla Tactics
Stratagems.Category: VANGUARD SPEARHEAD - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Phobos and/or Scout Squad units from your army, or one other Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
Stratagems.Restrictions: Each unit selected for this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy models.

Enhancements.Name: The Blade Driven Deep
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

Enhancements.Name: Ghostweave Cloak
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities

Enhancements.Name: Execute and Redeploy
Enhancements.Description: Phobos model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, if that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end ofthe turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge. This cannot allow the bearer’s unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

Enhancements.Name: Shadow War Veteran
Enhancements.Description: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12" of this model with a stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that stratagem by 1CP.

Rule.Title: EXTREMIS-LEVEL THREAT
Rule.Text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Heroes of the Chapter
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase orthe Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator, Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

Stratagems.Name: Terrifying Proficiency
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator, Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Duty and Honour
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator, Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unitfrom your army within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

Stratagems.Name: Orbital Teleportarium
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Stratagems.Name: Legendary Fortitude
Stratagems.Category: 1ST COMPANY TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator, Bladeguard Veteran Squad, Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Enhancements.Name: The Imperium’s Sword
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearers melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

Enhancements.Name: Fear Made Manifest (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

Enhancements.Name: Rites of War
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearers unit as well.

Enhancements.Name: Iron Resolve
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearers unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

Rule.Title: INTERLOCKING TACTICS
Rule.Text:
Adeptus Astartes Battleline units from your army:
▪ Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.
▪ Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.
Each time an Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an Adeptus Astartes model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Stratagems.Name: Codex Discipline
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Guided Disruption
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit from your army has finished making its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the Monster or Vehicle keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

Stratagems.Name: Light of Vengeance
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if the bearer has the Battleline keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Shock Bombardment
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit from your army finished making its attacks.
Stratagems.Target: That Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit.
Stratagems.Effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Angels Defiant
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Battleline unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Heresy Undone
Stratagems.Category: BASTION TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit (excluding Battleline units) from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.

Enhancements.Name: Eye Of The Primarch
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and Battleline models in the bearer’s unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Hero Of The Chapter
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the Battleline keyword.

Enhancements.Name: Blades Of Valour
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and Battleline models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

Enhancements.Name: Bombast Omnivox
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the Battleline keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

Rule.Title: RAPID-DROP DEPLOYMENT
Rule.Text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of Adeptus Astartes units (excluding Titanic units) from your army based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

BATTLE SIZE NUMBER OF UNITS
Incursion 2
Strike Force 3
Onslaught 4

Each time an Adeptus Astartes model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a Drop Pod this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

Stratagems.Name: Suppression Strafing
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until  the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each  time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

Stratagems.Name: Tactical Decapitation
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Shock Onslaught
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

Stratagems.Name: Auto-Sense Coordination
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have this ability in a turn in which they disembarked from a Drop Pod or while targeting an enemy unit within 12".

Stratagems.Name: Blind Screen
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly Adeptus Astartes Smoke Vehicle or Drop Pod unit within 9" of it.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Onward for the Emperor
Stratagems.Category: ORBITAL ASSAULT FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly Transport it is able to embark within.
Stratagems.Effect: If your Adeptus Astartes unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it.

Enhancements.Name: Laurels Of Thunder
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.

Enhancements.Name: Veteran Of The Vanguard
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Orbital Uplink Reliquary
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Adeptus Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Dedicated Gunship
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Terminator model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

Rule.Title: ADAPTIVE DEFENCE
Rule.Text:
Each time an Adeptus Astartes model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within a terrain feature, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

Adeptus Astartes units from your army gain the Entrenched keyword while all of the following are true:
▪ That unit is within a terrain feature.
▪ That unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn.
▪ No model in that unit has moved more than 3" this turn.

Stratagems.Name: Unyielding Might
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in your unit.

Stratagems.Name: Priority Strike
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Character, Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Stand to the End
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an Entrenched unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Augmented Targeting
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If your unit is Entrenched, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities instead.

Stratagems.Name: Evasive Repositioning
Stratagems.Category: CERAMITE SENTINELS - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is Entrenched, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

Enhancements.Name: Honour Indefatigable
Enhancements.Description: Gravis model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

Enhancements.Name: Castellum Omnivox
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn:
▪ That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back.
▪ That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Enhancements.Name: Spy-Skull Data Link
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Defensive Mastery
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Adeptus Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Rule.Title: RAPID DEPLOYMENT
Rule.Text:
Each time an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army disembarks from a Transport (excluding Fly) that made a Normal or Advance move this phase (excluding those that arrived from Strategic Reserves), that disembarked unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to D3+3" instead if that Transport is a HEAVY Transport (see below).

KEYWORDS
Adeptus Astartes Transport units from your army (excluding Fly) that have a Wounds characteristic of 14+ have the HEAVY Transport keyword.

Stratagems.Name: Machine Wrath
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a Heavy Transport unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: That Heavy Transport unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Rapid Embarkation
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - WARGEAR STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly Heavy Transport it is able to embark within.
Stratagems.Effect: If your Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit is wholly within 6" of that Heavy Transport, it can embark within it.

Stratagems.Name: Ceramite Sledgehammer
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a Heavy Transport, when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

Stratagems.Name: Advanced Deployment
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes Transport unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your Transport has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.

Stratagems.Name: Purgation Doctrine
Stratagems.Category: ARMOURED SPEARTIP - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll (if your unit disembarked from a Heavy Transport this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well).

Enhancements.Name: Liberator
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any Heavy Transport it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Enhancements.Name: Tip Of The Spear
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a Transport, that Transport has the Scouts 6" ability.

Enhancements.Name: Shock Deployment
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Terminator or Gravis model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a Transport this turn, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Armoured Commander
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Transport that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that Transport on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

Rule.Title: TARGET SIGHTED
Rule.Text:
Each time a Tank Ace unit from your army (see below) Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

Each time a Tank Ace unit from your army shoots in your Shooting phase, if that unit did not Advance this turn, you can re‑roll the Damage roll.

KEYWORDS
Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units from your army (excluding Fortifications, Drop Pods, Walkers and units that can Fly) have the Tank Ace keyword.

In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to three Tank Ace units from your army to gain the Character keyword.

Designer’s Note: This means that the selected units can be given Enhancements, and one of them can be selected as your Warlord.

Stratagems.Name: Armour of Contempt
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Target Weak Point
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tank Ace unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Kill Shot Stratagem in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Kill Shot
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tank Ace unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
Stratagems.Restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Target Weak Point Stratagem in the same phase.

Stratagems.Name: Rapid Gunnery
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Reactive Repositioning
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Tank Ace unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 8" of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

Stratagems.Name: Machine Vengeance
Stratagems.Category: HEADHUNTER TASK FORCE - EPIC DEED STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: One Tank Ace unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.

Enhancements.Name: Redoubtable Machine Spirit
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save and, at the end of your Command phase, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

Enhancements.Name: Gunnery Honours
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model only. Once per phase, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll for the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Firestorm Coordinators
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

Enhancements.Name: Astartes Tank Ace (Aura)
Enhancements.Description: Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model only. In your Shooting phase, while a friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle unit is within 6" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Rule.Title: SKYSTRIKE
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Land Speeder/Storm Speeder Hailstrike/Storm Speeder Hammerstrike/Storm Speeder Thunderstrike units have Speeder.
▪ In your first Movement phase, friendly Speeder units can make an ingress move.

Stratagems.Name: Data-link Augury
Stratagems.Category: FULGURIS TASK FORCE
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Speeder unit is selected to shoot.
Stratagems.Target: That Speeder unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until your unit has shot.

Stratagems.Name: Reactive Evasion
Stratagems.Category: FULGURIS TASK FORCE
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Speeder unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

Stratagems.Name: Anti-grav Surge
Stratagems.Category: FULGURIS TASK FORCE
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Speeder unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Place your unit in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Bellicose Weapon Spirits
Enhancements.Description:
Speeder unit only. This unit can re-roll:
	▪ Damage rolls
	▪ Rolls to determine the A of a weapon

Enhancements.Name: Raptorial Cogitator Core
Enhancements.Description: Speeder unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

AddedAbilities.Title: Skystrike
AddedAbilities.Text: In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

Rule.Title: PSYCHIC DISCIPLINES
Rule.Text:
At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines abilities. Friendly Adeptus Astartes Psyker units have that ability until the end of the battle round:
	▪ Biomancy Discipline: This unit has +2" M
	▪ Divination Discipline: This unit’s attacks can:
		▪ Re-roll Hit rolls of 1
		▪ Re-roll Wound rolls of 1
	▪ Pyromancy Discipline: This unit’s ranged attacks that target an enemy unit within 12" of this unit have +1 AP
	▪ Telekinesis Discipline: Ranged attacks that target this unit have -1 S
	▪ Telepathy Discipline: This unit’s attacks can ignore modifiers to BS, WS and Hit rolls

Enhancements.Name: Celerity
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only.
	▪ When this unit is selected to make an Advance move, that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge
	▪ When this unit is selected to make a Fall Back move, if this unit has the Biomancy Discipline ability, that move does not prevent this unit from being eligible to declare a charge

Enhancements.Name: Prescience
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only, excluding Terminator models. Once per turn, per unit, in your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is unengaged, this unit can make a Normal move of:
	▪ Up to D6"
	▪ Or, if this unit has the Divination Discipline ability, up to 6"

Enhancements.Name: Obfuscation
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only.
	▪ Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks
	▪ If this unit has the Telepathy Discipline ability, this unit has -3" detection range

Enhancements.Name: Temporal Corridor
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only.
	▪ At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can place this unit into Strategic Reserves
	▪ If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike

Enhancements.Name: Fusillade
Enhancements.Description:
Adeptus Astartes Psyker model only. This unit’s ranged attacks have:
▪ [ANTI-MONSTER/VEHICLE 5+].
▪ If this unit has the Pyromancy Discipline ability, [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

Rule.Title: NOWHERE TO HIDE
Rule.Text:
Friendly Phobos/Scout Squad units have the following ability:
Transhuman Perception: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected:
▪ While a unit is detected, that unit has +3" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Adaptive Operations
Stratagems.Category: SUBVERSION ASSETS
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Phobos/Scout Squad unit starts an action.
Stratagems.Target: That Phobos/Scout Squad unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

Stratagems.Name: Strike from the Shadows
Stratagems.Category: SUBVERSION ASSETS
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Phobos/Scout Squad unit has shot.
Stratagems.Target: That Phobos/Scout Squad unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

Stratagems.Name: Cloaked Position
Stratagems.Category: SUBVERSION ASSETS
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent’s Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Phobos/Scout Squad unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.

Enhancements.Name: Shroud Field
Enhancements.Description:
Phobos model only. This model has:
	▪ Lone Operative
	▪ Stealth

Enhancements.Name: Death in the Dark
Enhancements.Description: Infantry Phobos unit only. This unit’s attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 to Hit rolls.

AddedAbilities.Title: Transhuman Perception
AddedAbilities.Text:
In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is detected:
	▪ While a unit is detected, that unit has +3" detection range

ArmyRules.Title: OATH OF MOMENT
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Adeptus Astartes, at the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Oath of Moment target. Each time a model with this ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target:
	▪ You can re-roll the Hit roll.
	▪ If you are using a Codex: Space Marines Detachment and your army does not include one or more units with the Black Templars, Blood Angels, Dark Angels, Deathwatch or Space Wolves keywords, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

ArmyRules.Title: SPACE MARINE CHAPTERS
ArmyRules.Text:
▪ If an Adeptus Astartes unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Marneus Calgar has both the Adeptus Astartes and Ultramarines Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Ultramarines Chapter.

	▪ You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army.

	▪ If your army includes one or more Black Templars units, it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes Psyker models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the Black Templars keyword: Gladiator Lancer; Gladiator Reaper; Gladiator Valiant; Impulsor; Repulsor; Repulsor Executioner.

	▪ If your army includes one or more Space Wolves units, it cannot include any of the following units: Apothecary; Devastator Squad; Tactical Squad.

ArmyRules.Title: DEATHWATCH
ArmyRules.Text:
▪ Your army can include Adeptus Astartes Deathwatch units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.

	▪ With the exception of Kill Team Cassius (see Legends: Agents of the Imperium), your army cannot include any Agents of The Imperium Deathwatch units.

	▪ Your army cannot include any of the following units: Assault Squad; Assault Squad With Jump Packs; Attack Bike Squad; Devastator Squad; Land Speed Storm; Relic Terminator Squad; Scout Bike Squad; Scout Squad; Scout Sniper Squad; Tactical Squad; Terminator Assault Squad; Terminator Squad.

ArmyRules.Title: KILL TEAMS
ArmyRules.Text:
Each time an attack targets a Kill Team unit from your army that contains models with different Toughness characteristics, until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, use the Toughness characteristic of the majority of the models in that unit when determining what result is required for that attack to successfully wound. If two or more Toughness characteristics are tied for majority, use the highest Toughness characteristic. 

For the purposes of determining which models can embark within a Transport model, Kill Team models follow the normal restrictions listed on the Transport model.
